name: Williamcheng
title: Full-Stack Developer & Photographer
bio_zh:
你好！我是一名热爱技术、摄影和写作的全栈开发者。我专注于构建美观且实用的 Web 应用，并在业余时间探索城市风光摄影。

我相信技术应该服务于人，好的设计能够改变世界。在不断学习的过程中，我享受将创意转化为现实的过程。
bio_en:
Hi! I'm a full-stack developer passionate about technology, photography, and writing. I focus on building beautiful and functional web applications, and explore urban landscape photography in my spare time.

I believe technology should serve people, and good design can change the world. I enjoy the process of turning creative ideas into reality through continuous learning.
